task_objective: Revise the 'Last Operation' layout in the QAM panel to use a read-only, non-interactive Field with stable left/right anchors, tabular numbers for timestamp formatting, and clean ellipsis-based truncation.
design_decisions: Use a non-interactive Field component by setting focusable={false} and highlightOnFocus={false} to adhere to read-only semantics.
Structure the content using a flex row with space-between alignment (without spaces around the CSS colon to satisfy test constraints).
Use min-width: 0, text-overflow: ellipsis, and white-space: nowrap on the operation result container to handle overflow gracefully without pushing the timestamp offscreen.
Use tabular numerals (tabular-nums) for the timestamp to prevent layout shifting.
results: All frontend and backend checks passed successfully, including ruff, pytests, typechecks, and frontend supply-chain verification.
